span.p: [WhatsApp] User sends Hi, join, register, provider keyword, or taps Find Work

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: [Backend] WhatsApp webhook parses inbound text, media, list reply, or button reply

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: [Backend] Normalize phone number and derive lookup variants

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: [Backend] Load conversation session or route stateless provider actions

span.p: [WhatsApp] Block provider onboarding for customer phone

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: [WhatsApp] Pending provider sees Application Status, Update Application, Support

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: [WhatsApp] Approved active provider sees My Jobs, Available Jobs, Check Status, Pause Leads, Worker Portal, Support

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: [WhatsApp] Inactive/suspended provider sees Provider Status and Support

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: [Backend] Do not restart onboarding for existing provider or active application
